testcase.name: WASM renderer initializes successfully
testcase.system-out: [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Fetching from https://storage.noahcohn.com/api/shaders?all=true [BROWSER log] 🔧 WASM renderer explicitly requested via ?renderer=wasm [BROWSER log] [WASM] Init attempt 1/3... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Loading from: /wasm/pixelocity_wasm.js [BROWSER log] Pixelocity WASM module loaded. Call initWasmRenderer() to start. [BROWSER log] 🚀 Pixelocity WASM Renderer initializing... [BROWSER log] Canvas: 2048x2048 [BROWSER log] [WASM] Requesting WebGPU adapter (attempt 1/4, powerPreference=HighPerformance, fallbackAdapter=false)... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Adapter attempt 1 failed. [BROWSER log] [WASM] Requesting WebGPU adapter (attempt 2/4, powerPreference=Undefined, fallbackAdapter=false)... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Adapter attempt 2 failed. [BROWSER log] [WASM] Requesting WebGPU adapter (attempt 3/4, powerPreference=LowPower, fallbackAdapter=false)... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Adapter attempt 3 failed. [BROWSER log] [WASM] Requesting WebGPU adapter (attempt 4/4, powerPreference=Undefined, fallbackAdapter=true)... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Adapter attempt 4 failed. [BROWSER log] ❌ Failed to get WebGPU adapter after all fallback attempts. [BROWSER log] This commonly happens on Windows with Chrome/Edge when using emdawnwebgpu. [BROWSER log] The JS WebGPU renderer is unaffected. Consider using ?renderer=webgpu or the UI toggle. [BROWSER log] ❌ Failed to create WebGPU device [BROWSER error] [WASM] Failed to initialize WASM renderer (C++ returned 0) [BROWSER error] ❌ WASM Renderer init failed (attempt 1/3). Common cause on Windows + Chrome/Edge: Dawn (C++) failed to acquire a WebGPU adapter. See console for detailed C++ logs. Falling back to JS WebGPU renderer. [BROWSER error] [WebGPU Renderer] wasm-init: WASM Renderer init failed (attempt 1/3). Common cause on Windows + Chrome/Edge: Dawn (C++) failed to acquire a WebGPU adapter. See console for detailed C++ logs. Falling back to JS WebGPU renderer. [BROWSER warning] [RendererManager] switchRenderer('wasm') failed — keeping previous renderer [BROWSER warning] ⚠️ WASM renderer requested but failed to initialise — falling back to TypeScript WebGPU [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER error] [WebGPU Renderer] webgpu-unavailable: No suitable GPU adapter found. Your device may not support WebGPU. [BROWSER warning] [WebGPU] No GPU adapter found [BROWSER warning] [RendererManager] switchRenderer('webgpu') failed — keeping previous renderer [BROWSER warning] ⚠️ WebGPU unavailable — falling back to Canvas2D (shaders disabled) [BROWSER log] ✅ JS Renderer initialized with canvas size: 2048x2048 [BROWSER log] DIAGNOSTICS: { "rendererType": "js", "metrics": { "fps": 0, "frameTime": 0, "agentCount": 0, "isWASM": false }, "timestamp": "2026-06-14T23:54:40.459Z" } DIAGNOSTICS: { rendererType: [32m'js'[39m, metrics: { fps: [33m0[39m, frameTime: [33m0[39m, agentCount: [33m0[39m, isWASM: [33mfalse[39m }, timestamp: [32m'2026-06-14T23:54:40.474Z'[39m } CONSOLE MESSAGES: [] WASM renderer fell back (expected in CI)

testcase.name: WASM renderer loads single shader without errors
testcase.system-out: [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Fetching from https://storage.noahcohn.com/api/shaders?all=true [BROWSER log] 🔧 WASM renderer explicitly requested via ?renderer=wasm [BROWSER log] [WASM] Init attempt 1/3... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Loading from: /wasm/pixelocity_wasm.js [BROWSER log] Pixelocity WASM module loaded. Call initWasmRenderer() to start. [BROWSER log] 🚀 Pixelocity WASM Renderer initializing... [BROWSER log] Canvas: 2048x2048 [BROWSER log] [WASM] Requesting WebGPU adapter (attempt 1/4, powerPreference=HighPerformance, fallbackAdapter=false)... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Adapter attempt 1 failed. [BROWSER log] [WASM] Requesting WebGPU adapter (attempt 2/4, powerPreference=Undefined, fallbackAdapter=false)... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Adapter attempt 2 failed. [BROWSER log] [WASM] Requesting WebGPU adapter (attempt 3/4, powerPreference=LowPower, fallbackAdapter=false)... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Adapter attempt 3 failed. [BROWSER log] [WASM] Requesting WebGPU adapter (attempt 4/4, powerPreference=Undefined, fallbackAdapter=true)... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Adapter attempt 4 failed. [BROWSER log] ❌ Failed to get WebGPU adapter after all fallback attempts. [BROWSER log] This commonly happens on Windows with Chrome/Edge when using emdawnwebgpu. [BROWSER log] The JS WebGPU renderer is unaffected. Consider using ?renderer=webgpu or the UI toggle. [BROWSER log] ❌ Failed to create WebGPU device [BROWSER error] [WASM] Failed to initialize WASM renderer (C++ returned 0) [BROWSER error] ❌ WASM Renderer init failed (attempt 1/3). Common cause on Windows + Chrome/Edge: Dawn (C++) failed to acquire a WebGPU adapter. See console for detailed C++ logs. Falling back to JS WebGPU renderer. [BROWSER error] [WebGPU Renderer] wasm-init: WASM Renderer init failed (attempt 1/3). Common cause on Windows + Chrome/Edge: Dawn (C++) failed to acquire a WebGPU adapter. See console for detailed C++ logs. Falling back to JS WebGPU renderer. [BROWSER warning] [RendererManager] switchRenderer('wasm') failed — keeping previous renderer [BROWSER warning] ⚠️ WASM renderer requested but failed to initialise — falling back to TypeScript WebGPU [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER error] [WebGPU Renderer] webgpu-unavailable: No suitable GPU adapter found. Your device may not support WebGPU. [BROWSER warning] [WebGPU] No GPU adapter found [BROWSER warning] [RendererManager] switchRenderer('webgpu') failed — keeping previous renderer [BROWSER warning] ⚠️ WebGPU unavailable — falling back to Canvas2D (shaders disabled) [BROWSER log] ✅ JS Renderer initialized with canvas size: 2048x2048 [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Received 1232 shaders from API [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Shaders with real defaults: 1 [BROWSER log] Loaded local manifest. Total: 999 images, 19 videos [BROWSER log] 🎨 JSRenderer: 60 frames rendered, canvas: 2048x2048, ctx: OK [BROWSER log] ✅ JSRenderer: Image loaded 768x768

testcase.name: WASM renderer loads multiple shaders (multi-slot stack)
testcase.system-out: [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Fetching from https://storage.noahcohn.com/api/shaders?all=true [BROWSER log] 🔧 WASM renderer explicitly requested via ?renderer=wasm [BROWSER log] [WASM] Init attempt 1/3... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Loading from: /wasm/pixelocity_wasm.js [BROWSER log] Pixelocity WASM module loaded. Call initWasmRenderer() to start. [BROWSER log] 🚀 Pixelocity WASM Renderer initializing... [BROWSER log] Canvas: 2048x2048 [BROWSER log] [WASM] Requesting WebGPU adapter (attempt 1/4, powerPreference=HighPerformance, fallbackAdapter=false)... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Adapter attempt 1 failed. [BROWSER log] [WASM] Requesting WebGPU adapter (attempt 2/4, powerPreference=Undefined, fallbackAdapter=false)... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Adapter attempt 2 failed. [BROWSER log] [WASM] Requesting WebGPU adapter (attempt 3/4, powerPreference=LowPower, fallbackAdapter=false)... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Adapter attempt 3 failed. [BROWSER log] [WASM] Requesting WebGPU adapter (attempt 4/4, powerPreference=Undefined, fallbackAdapter=true)... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Adapter attempt 4 failed. [BROWSER log] ❌ Failed to get WebGPU adapter after all fallback attempts. [BROWSER log] This commonly happens on Windows with Chrome/Edge when using emdawnwebgpu. [BROWSER log] The JS WebGPU renderer is unaffected. Consider using ?renderer=webgpu or the UI toggle. [BROWSER log] ❌ Failed to create WebGPU device [BROWSER error] [WASM] Failed to initialize WASM renderer (C++ returned 0) [BROWSER error] ❌ WASM Renderer init failed (attempt 1/3). Common cause on Windows + Chrome/Edge: Dawn (C++) failed to acquire a WebGPU adapter. See console for detailed C++ logs. Falling back to JS WebGPU renderer. [BROWSER error] [WebGPU Renderer] wasm-init: WASM Renderer init failed (attempt 1/3). Common cause on Windows + Chrome/Edge: Dawn (C++) failed to acquire a WebGPU adapter. See console for detailed C++ logs. Falling back to JS WebGPU renderer. [BROWSER warning] [RendererManager] switchRenderer('wasm') failed — keeping previous renderer [BROWSER warning] ⚠️ WASM renderer requested but failed to initialise — falling back to TypeScript WebGPU [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER error] [WebGPU Renderer] webgpu-unavailable: No suitable GPU adapter found. Your device may not support WebGPU. [BROWSER warning] [WebGPU] No GPU adapter found [BROWSER warning] [RendererManager] switchRenderer('webgpu') failed — keeping previous renderer [BROWSER warning] ⚠️ WebGPU unavailable — falling back to Canvas2D (shaders disabled) [BROWSER log] ✅ JS Renderer initialized with canvas size: 2048x2048 [BROWSER log] Loaded local manifest. Total: 999 images, 19 videos [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Received 1232 shaders from API [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Shaders with real defaults: 1 [BROWSER log] 🎨 JSRenderer: 60 frames rendered, canvas: 2048x2048, ctx: OK [BROWSER log] ✅ JSRenderer: Image loaded 1024x1024

testcase.name: WASM renderer handles shader loading with minimal console errors
testcase.system-out: [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Fetching from https://storage.noahcohn.com/api/shaders?all=true [BROWSER log] 🔧 WASM renderer explicitly requested via ?renderer=wasm [BROWSER log] [WASM] Init attempt 1/3... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Loading from: /wasm/pixelocity_wasm.js [BROWSER log] Pixelocity WASM module loaded. Call initWasmRenderer() to start. [BROWSER log] 🚀 Pixelocity WASM Renderer initializing... [BROWSER log] Canvas: 2048x2048 [BROWSER log] [WASM] Requesting WebGPU adapter (attempt 1/4, powerPreference=HighPerformance, fallbackAdapter=false)... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Adapter attempt 1 failed. [BROWSER log] [WASM] Requesting WebGPU adapter (attempt 2/4, powerPreference=Undefined, fallbackAdapter=false)... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Adapter attempt 2 failed. [BROWSER log] [WASM] Requesting WebGPU adapter (attempt 3/4, powerPreference=LowPower, fallbackAdapter=false)... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Adapter attempt 3 failed. [BROWSER log] [WASM] Requesting WebGPU adapter (attempt 4/4, powerPreference=Undefined, fallbackAdapter=true)... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Adapter attempt 4 failed. [BROWSER log] ❌ Failed to get WebGPU adapter after all fallback attempts. [BROWSER log] This commonly happens on Windows with Chrome/Edge when using emdawnwebgpu. [BROWSER log] The JS WebGPU renderer is unaffected. Consider using ?renderer=webgpu or the UI toggle. [BROWSER log] ❌ Failed to create WebGPU device [BROWSER error] [WASM] Failed to initialize WASM renderer (C++ returned 0) [BROWSER error] ❌ WASM Renderer init failed (attempt 1/3). Common cause on Windows + Chrome/Edge: Dawn (C++) failed to acquire a WebGPU adapter. See console for detailed C++ logs. Falling back to JS WebGPU renderer. [BROWSER error] [WebGPU Renderer] wasm-init: WASM Renderer init failed (attempt 1/3). Common cause on Windows + Chrome/Edge: Dawn (C++) failed to acquire a WebGPU adapter. See console for detailed C++ logs. Falling back to JS WebGPU renderer. [BROWSER warning] [RendererManager] switchRenderer('wasm') failed — keeping previous renderer [BROWSER warning] ⚠️ WASM renderer requested but failed to initialise — falling back to TypeScript WebGPU [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER error] [WebGPU Renderer] webgpu-unavailable: No suitable GPU adapter found. Your device may not support WebGPU. [BROWSER warning] [WebGPU] No GPU adapter found [BROWSER warning] [RendererManager] switchRenderer('webgpu') failed — keeping previous renderer [BROWSER warning] ⚠️ WebGPU unavailable — falling back to Canvas2D (shaders disabled) [BROWSER log] ✅ JS Renderer initialized with canvas size: 2048x2048 [BROWSER log] Loaded local manifest. Total: 999 images, 19 videos [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Received 1232 shaders from API [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Shaders with real defaults: 1 [BROWSER log] DIAGNOSTICS: { "rendererType": "js", "metrics": { "fps": 0, "frameTime": 0, "agentCount": 0, "isWASM": false }, "timestamp": "2026-06-14T23:55:00.859Z" } [BROWSER log] ✅ JSRenderer: Image loaded 1024x1024

testcase.name: WASM renderer collects performance metrics
testcase.system-out: [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Fetching from https://storage.noahcohn.com/api/shaders?all=true [BROWSER log] 🔧 WASM renderer explicitly requested via ?renderer=wasm [BROWSER log] [WASM] Init attempt 1/3... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Loading from: /wasm/pixelocity_wasm.js [BROWSER log] Pixelocity WASM module loaded. Call initWasmRenderer() to start. [BROWSER log] 🚀 Pixelocity WASM Renderer initializing... [BROWSER log] Canvas: 2048x2048 [BROWSER log] [WASM] Requesting WebGPU adapter (attempt 1/4, powerPreference=HighPerformance, fallbackAdapter=false)... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Adapter attempt 1 failed. [BROWSER log] [WASM] Requesting WebGPU adapter (attempt 2/4, powerPreference=Undefined, fallbackAdapter=false)... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Adapter attempt 2 failed. [BROWSER log] [WASM] Requesting WebGPU adapter (attempt 3/4, powerPreference=LowPower, fallbackAdapter=false)... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Adapter attempt 3 failed. [BROWSER log] [WASM] Requesting WebGPU adapter (attempt 4/4, powerPreference=Undefined, fallbackAdapter=true)... [BROWSER log] [WASM] Adapter attempt 4 failed. [BROWSER log] ❌ Failed to get WebGPU adapter after all fallback attempts. [BROWSER log] This commonly happens on Windows with Chrome/Edge when using emdawnwebgpu. [BROWSER log] The JS WebGPU renderer is unaffected. Consider using ?renderer=webgpu or the UI toggle. [BROWSER log] ❌ Failed to create WebGPU device [BROWSER error] [WASM] Failed to initialize WASM renderer (C++ returned 0) [BROWSER error] ❌ WASM Renderer init failed (attempt 1/3). Common cause on Windows + Chrome/Edge: Dawn (C++) failed to acquire a WebGPU adapter. See console for detailed C++ logs. Falling back to JS WebGPU renderer. [BROWSER error] [WebGPU Renderer] wasm-init: WASM Renderer init failed (attempt 1/3). Common cause on Windows + Chrome/Edge: Dawn (C++) failed to acquire a WebGPU adapter. See console for detailed C++ logs. Falling back to JS WebGPU renderer. [BROWSER warning] [RendererManager] switchRenderer('wasm') failed — keeping previous renderer [BROWSER warning] ⚠️ WASM renderer requested but failed to initialise — falling back to TypeScript WebGPU [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER warning] No available adapters. [BROWSER error] [WebGPU Renderer] webgpu-unavailable: No suitable GPU adapter found. Your device may not support WebGPU. [BROWSER warning] [WebGPU] No GPU adapter found [BROWSER warning] [RendererManager] switchRenderer('webgpu') failed — keeping previous renderer [BROWSER warning] ⚠️ WebGPU unavailable — falling back to Canvas2D (shaders disabled) [BROWSER log] ✅ JS Renderer initialized with canvas size: 2048x2048 [BROWSER log] Loaded local manifest. Total: 999 images, 19 videos [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Received 1232 shaders from API [BROWSER log] [ShaderApi] Shaders with real defaults: 1 === WASM Renderer Metrics === {} FPS: undefined Init Time: undefined Has Module: undefined ============================== Skipping WASM performance metric assertions because renderer fell back to undefined
